## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `node --check` passes on every changed `.js` / `.mjs`
- [ ] `node tests/<file>.test.mjs` passes for the affected tests
- [ ] Code, docstrings, and comments are in English
- [ ] No new permissions added to `manifest.json` (or the addition is justified in this PR)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the `type(scope): subject` convention
